metadata.name: Perform a Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for a Breakdown

description: Following a major equipment failure, a reliability engineer needs to lead a formal Root Cause Analysis (RCA).

nodes.task_description: Create a new RCA record and link it to the corrective maintenance work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the RCA and links it to the breakdown event.

nodes.task_description: Use a '5 Whys' or 'Fishbone Diagram' template to document the investigation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent populates the chosen RCA methodology template with findings from the team.

nodes.task_description: Identify the root cause (e.g., 'Incorrect lubricant used') and propose corrective actions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent documents the final root cause and recommends creating a new PM task to verify correct lubricant.
